findings.title: Timeline Scrolling Mechanism is Viable
findings.summary: The R3 mockup successfully demonstrates a horizontally scrolling timeline with a sticky beat ruler. This resolves the previous MEDIUM severity issue (R2-MED-01) by providing a clear and scalable solution for handling musical sections longer than the viewport width.
findings.recommendation: None. The proposed solution is approved.

findings.title: Direct Manipulation Model is Well-Implemented
findings.summary: The design now prioritizes direct manipulation by making syllable text and dynamics editable in-place, removing the need for a separate properties panel. This resolves R2-LOW-01 and R2-LOW-02, resulting in a more fluid and intuitive workflow.
findings.recommendation: None. The proposed solution is approved.

findings.title: Structured Input for Vocal Direction
findings.summary: The free-text field for 'direction' has been replaced with a dropdown selector, resolving R2-LOW-03. This ensures data consistency and improves usability.
findings.recommendation: None. The proposed solution is approved.
